TextView.value: Select which features you want to sync. Clicking Broadcast sends your current ON/OFF choices
for Attack, Movement, Use, Bags, Trade, NPC Chat, and NPC Trade to all characters.
Do NOT use ManagerSync with bots that handle pathing, attacking, or NPC chats:
Automaton.City, Automaton.DB1, Automaton.DB2, Automaton.Inf, Automaton.KH, Automaton.Mitaar,
Automaton.Roamba, Automaton.Vortexx, AIMission.Bot, S13.Bot, LeBuddy, S13AXPFarmer.
Outside Invites – Allows invites from players outside Your local team.
Broadcast Settings:
Attack – Makes other characters attack the same target as the driver.
Movement – Makes other characters follow the driver's movements.
Use – Syncs using items, including items used on targets.
Bags – When Use is enabled, also uses items in bags named 'syncbag'.
Trade – Auto-accepts trades from any player.
NPC Chat – Syncs dialog choices when speaking to NPCs.
NPC Trade – Syncs trading of items or credits to NPCs.
/ManagerSync – Opens or closes the ManagerSync UI.
/sync – Enable/disable ManagerSync.
/syncattack – Toggle sync attack. '/syncattack all' also broadcasts.
/syncmove – Toggle sync movement. '/syncmove all' also broadcasts.
/syncuse – Toggle sync use. '/syncuse all' also broadcasts.
/syncbags – Toggle sync bags. '/syncbags all' also broadcasts.
/synctrade – Toggle sync trade. '/synctrade all' also broadcasts.
/syncchat – Toggle sync NPC chat. '/syncchat all' also broadcasts.
/syncnpctrade – Toggle sync NPC trade. '/syncnpctrade all' also broadcasts.
/logout – Logs all out.
/logout PlayerName – Sends the command to that player to log out.
/spreadem – Same as the Spread Out button.
/form – Same as the Team button.
/formraid – Forms a raid.
/convert – Converts team to raid.
/reform – Reforms team.
/synclft [message] – leaves team (if in one), goes lft, turns outside invites on. [message optional]
/ManagerSyncchannel – View or set IPC channel (default is 4).
Only change the channel if splitting your team into separate sync groups.
